case_title: ADAM HEITMAN VS. THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) MORGAN HAKY, INTERN. FILED BY DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
